forecast-period.text: A weak low pressure system lies over the North East Pastoral district and is expected to weaken further as it moves into east into NSW this evening. A weak ridge of high pressure begins to move across SA on Thursday ahead of a cold front moving across the south on Friday. Another weak high pressure system moves across from the west over the weekend.
Wind and wave forecasts are averages. Wind gusts can be 40 per cent stronger than the forecast, and stronger still in squalls and thunderstorms. Maximum waves can be twice the forecast height.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones. Marine forecasts are also available on VHF and HF radio. View the radio schedule on www.bom.gov.au/marine
Check the latest Coastal Waters Forecasts for information on wind, wave and weather conditions for neighbouring coastal zones.

area.description: Far West Coast: WA-SA Border to Fowlers Bay

forecast-period.text: South to southeasterly below 10 knots.
Below 0.5 metres.
Southeasterly 2 metres, decreasing to 1.5 metres by early evening.
Southwesterly around 1 metre.
Mostly clear.
Northerly about 10 knots increasing to 10 to 15 knots in the morning. Winds reaching up to 20 knots offshore in the late evening.
Below 1 metre, increasing to around 1 metre offshore.
Southeasterly 1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre during the morning.
Southwesterly around 1 metre.
Partly cloudy.
Northwesterly 15 to 20 knots turning west to southwesterly during the morning.
Around 1 metre.
Southwesterly around 1 metre inshore, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres offshore.
Mostly sunny.
Westerly 10 to 15 knots turning south to southwesterly below 10 knots during the afternoon.
Around 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres inshore, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres offshore.
Partly cloudy. 60% chance of showers.

area.description: Upper West Coast: Fowlers Bay to Elliston

forecast-period.text: South to southeasterly about 10 knots.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres.
Southerly 1 to 1.5 metres.
Clear.
Variable about 10 knots becoming northwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the middle of the day then tending northerly in the evening.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Streaky Bay.
South to southeasterly 1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre during the morning.
Partly cloudy.
North to northwesterly 15 to 20 knots turning westerly in the late morning.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Streaky Bay during the morning.
Southwesterly around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Streaky Bay.
Partly cloudy.
Westerly 15 to 20 knots turning southwesterly 10 to 15 knots during the afternoon.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres south of Streaky Bay.
Southwesterly 1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres during the morning.
Partly cloudy. 90% chance of showers.

area.description: Lower West Coast: Elliston to Cape Carnot

forecast-period.text: Southerly 10 to 15 knots becoming variable below 10 knots in the evening.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 metres.
South to southeasterly around 1 metre inshore, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres offshore.
Mostly clear.
Variable below 10 knots becoming northwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the middle of the day.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres.
Southeasterly around 1 metre.
Partly cloudy.
North to northwesterly 15 to 20 knots turning westerly in the late morning.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the morning.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre during the morning, then increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres around midday.
Partly cloudy. 80% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
Westerly 15 to 20 knots turning southwesterly during the afternoon.
1 to 1.5 metres.
Southwesterly 1.5 to 2.5 metres.
Partly cloudy. 95% chance of showers.
Southeasterly about 10 knots increasing to 10 to 15 knots in the late afternoon.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 metres.
Southeasterly below 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres in the west.
Partly cloudy.
Variable about 10 knots becoming northwesterly 10 to 15 knots in the evening.
Below 1 metre.
Southwesterly 1.5 metres.
Southeasterly 1 to 1.5 metres, decreasing to around 1 metre during the morning.
Partly cloudy. 50% chance of showers.
Northwesterly 15 to 25 knots turning westerly 15 to 20 knots in the late morning.
Below 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 2 metres during the morning.
Southwesterly 1 to 1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres in the west by early evening.
Partly cloudy. 95% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
Westerly 15 to 20 knots turning southwesterly during the afternoon.
1.5 metres, increasing to 1.5 to 2 metres in the west.
Westerly 2 to 2.5 metres.
Partly cloudy. 90% chance of showers.
